programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Quarantine Crazy
programme.desc: As the Coronavirus pandemic grips the nation, Terry invites the family to hunker down with him at the ranch, driving everyone crazy.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Man Problems
programme.desc: Terry and the girls get involved in Rachel’s love life, resulting in a competition to find her Mr. Right. The family tries to talk Terry out of agreeing to be a potential spokesperson for a certain product.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Fit For The Fastlane
programme.desc: Terry prepares to announce at a NASCAR race, which will be his first public appearance since the pandemic started. Wanting to look his best, he tries getting back into shape while trying to convince Rachel to sing at the speedway.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Oui Oui Terr-y
programme.desc: Tammy grows suspicious of Terry’s romantic anniversary surprise trip to Paris. Meanwhile, Zurie joins in on the Bradshaw family tradition and finds her passion for showing horses.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Top Chef
programme.desc: Terry and Tammy attempt one last time to try and convince Lacey and Noah to move to Texas by offering to buy them a restaurant. Meanwhile, Rachel introduces her new guy to the family by pulling a major prank on Terry.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Solutions
programme.desc: Join Terry Bradshaw and his family as they navigate life.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Review and Renew
programme.desc: Todd appoints himself director when he and the kids film a commercial for the Juice Bar. Meanwhile, Julie and Lea look into a new rejuvenation procedure.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Go Flip Yourself
programme.desc: Todd is forced to the rescue when Chase and Parker take on a house-flipping project. Then, when Todd's childhood friend and prankster-in-crime Bill comes to visit, Julie seeks solace with Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Message in a Bottle Rocket
programme.desc: Todd takes the family to a rustic resort for Independence Day, but gets mocked for his outdoor skills. Meanwhile, Chase and Parker become the source of major fireworks.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Around
programme.desc: The family visits Las Vegas to support Savannah in the Miss Teen USA Beauty Pageant. While there, Chase has to keep tabs on Nanny Faye's gambling addiction.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Pretty in Print
programme.desc: Todd and Savannah are both chosen to be part of a magazine's '25 Most Beautiful People of Nashville' issue. Meanwhile, Julie helps Chase prep for his real estate exam.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Truth or Chair
programme.desc: Todd moves his mother to Nashville, but her belongings take over his pristine home. Meanwhile, Chase insists that his dad take a lie detector test after he catches wind of his father's penchant for lying.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rent Controlled
programme.desc: Todd offers to help Savannah purchase a home, but there are strings attached. Meanwhile, Grayson's monthly phone bill gets him in hot water with Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The House That Todd Built
programme.desc: Todd signs the family up with a local charity in order to teach the kids about giving back to the community. Grayson's school project causes a rift between Todd and Faye over their heritage.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: A Very Chrisley Christmas
programme.desc: The Chrisleys gather round the tree to take a look back at some wildly entertaining never-before-seen footage from season 2.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: A Very Chrisley Christmas 2
programme.desc: Following last season's hit special, 'A Very Chrisley Christmas', viewers will get another holiday delight as the Chrisley family welcomes you into their impeccably decorated winter wonderland home and prepares for Julie's delicious Christmas dinner.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Santa’s Helpers and Holiday Dances
programme.desc: Joel McHale and Sarah McHale, Mike 'The Miz' Mizanin and Maryse Ouellet and Lamorne Morris and Alesha Renee compete remotely from their own homes in a special holiday-themed night of fun and games hosted by Kevin Hart.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: All I Want For Christmas Is
programme.desc: All Daria wants for Christmas is her first orgasm, and Allison may be just the one to deliver this gift. Food blogger Monica bumps and grinds with personal trainer Adam at bumper cars on ice.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Christmas Cookies
programme.desc: Mallory wants to give her Christmas cookies to the perfect guy, and Mazen may be the complete package, if he remembers to bring the mistletoe. Charles takes Kyle sand sledding, but Kyle's revelations at dinner land him on Santa's naughty list.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Breaking the Ice
programme.desc: Katrina and Alice jump in the pool for a sensual mermaid lesson, and back on land things go swimmingly at drinks. Bayou bouncer Nate has his hands full with artist Tiera at an ice sculpture class, where she eventually warms to his charms.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Beaches Be Cray
programme.desc: Bubbly Megan meets up with a 'humble' Zach for a day on the water in hopes of winning his heart before the kayak tips over.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Drunk Dating
programme.desc: Talent agent John and model Alyssa climb obstacles at a parkour course, but navigating their way through dinner proves more challenging. Christian takes Nakia to a distillery where they try hand crafted spirits, and moonwalking, for the first time.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Steamy Down Under
programme.desc: London expat Hannah and Joy hit it off and things get steamy, but not exactly where Hannah expected. Hair model and vegan Devin tries to impose his healthy lifestyle on former beauty queen Lauryn.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Love on Crop Top
programme.desc: Crop top fashion designer William climbs to new heights to find love with product manager Andrew on a risky high-wire ropes course. Solomon and Atlanta-native Maya go chocolate making on their date, and the night gets sweeter from there.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: A Date with Aqua Man
programme.desc: When tough chick Melissa meets up with male model Lorenzo, she is thrown for a loop with his nice guy demeanor but doesn't hold back over drinks when he has to weigh his food.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: License to Date
programme.desc: Young and fun entrepreneur Natalia is ready to let loose and find the man of her dreams with golf instructor Zack, if she doesn't kill him on the golf cart first.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Twerk in Progress
programme.desc: High-spirited cheer instructor Sakoiya is searching for the well-endowed man of her dreams with Mayowa, a musician who has never cheered before. Chris is eager to find a big bootie'd girl he can twerk with.

programme.title: Movie: Stepmom
programme.desc: A woman teaches both herself and her children to accept her ex-husband's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Movie: Overboard
programme.desc: A snobby heiress suffers from amnesia after falling off her yacht and hitting her head. A carpenter takes advantage of the situation by convincing her that she is his wife and the mother of his unruly brood of children.

programme.desc: Lounge singer Deloris returns to the convent to help choral students save their school.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.desc: Texas game wardens protect the natural resources of their vast state while fighting crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Raccoon Rescue
programme.desc: With the help of local police, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett remove campers found illegally occupying state property. An 8-year-old boy is found riding solo on an ATV, and Officer Crouse helps two raccoon cubs found on the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett investigate a possible illegal turkey kill site, while Officer Bronson responds to a call about a snake in a bed. Officer Demler confronts a suspect about shooting a turkey on private property.

programme.desc: While one group of officers looks to save an injured deer that is dangerously close to a major roadway, another squad is on the hunt for a group of reckless drivers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Distress Call
programme.desc: In Maine, a game warden's job changes with the seasons. Sergeant Spahr helps a fledgling owl that has taken a tumble and Warden Stevens and a medical team look for a distressed hiker into the night.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rapid Responders

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tiger Eyes

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Giraffe Road Trip
programme.desc: The family prepares Croc One, Steve Irwin's research ship, for a mission to release an endangered sea turtle back to the wild. Scarlett the Giraffe is reunited with her grandmother, and Grub the wild Echidna is released from the Zoo's Wildlife Hospital.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert, King of Cobras
programme.desc: Robert follows in Steve's steps wrangling Utah, a highly venomous 12-foot king cobra. Dr. Amber visits Tandora to care for wild Koalas. Back at the Zoo, an old injury flares up for Bruce the Brolga, a bird who's been in the Irwin's care for 26 years.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi's Lemur Island
programme.desc: The Australia Zoo's Alligator Snapping Turtles need a health check, and it's Robert's job to protect from their fierce bites. Terri and Bindi welcome seven new Lemurs from the US. The Zoo's Rescue Unit is called to save possums caught in a chimney.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Irwin African Adventure
programme.desc: Following Steve's dream of global conservation, the Irwins travel to South Africa. Terri helps release a wild leopard, Bindi learns from the all-female anti-poaching squad The Black Mambas, and Robert attempts to photograph Africa's 'Big Five.'

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: It's a Baby Giraffe!
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck in the Australia Zoo's Mammal Department as Rosie the Giraffe is ready to give birth. Robert has a bloody encounter with a wild python that's entered an enclosure, and Terri helps the keepers wrangle Chief the Tasmanian Devil.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Baby Kangaroo
programme.desc: While Bindi and the keepers ready Sophie the baby giraffe for her first steps into her enclosure, Robert helps to hand-raise another baby: Melman the kangaroo. Terri oversees a health check for one of the zoo's favourite characters, Ravi the red panda.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Race to Save the Platypus
programme.desc: Terri welcomes Mballa, a new cheetah cub from South Africa, to the Australia zoo family. Meanwhile, Robert sets out to save a stranded platypus and Bindi prepares to meet Bert the koala Joey as he emerges from his mother's pouch for the first time.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tortoise First Date

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Cursed Towns
programme.desc: From a Vermont bridge where a jilted teenage girl leaped to her death, to a Tennessee intersection that was a the site of a deadly shoot out, we venture into towns across America haunted by the transgressions of the past.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Devil's Playground
programme.desc: From a Nevada motel centered around clowns and haunted by a 1911 tragedy to a Maine movie theater where the horror lurks in the aisles and not on the screen, we explore scary attractions across the nation.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Restless Dead
programme.desc: From a former Victorian-era asylum where victims were experimented on to a remote Nebraska outpost where a scorned woman killed her unfaithful husband, we explore the gravest of locations where the dead never sleep.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Haunted Road Trips
programme.desc: From a Mississippi bridge where a murderer was hanged for his crimes to Savannah's oldest operating hotel built prior to the Civil War, these terrifying roads and haunted roadside spots will make any driver want to lock the doors and roll up the windows.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Unnatural World
programme.desc: From a Nebraska road where a farmer hung his entire family to an Upstate New York farmhouse where a demon has long overstayed its welcome, we explore locations linked to unnerving and terrifying tales.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume One
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries and legends surrounding seven spine tingling sites.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Two

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Three
programme.desc: In this hour of Most Terrifying Places in America, we keep crisscrossing the country to tour even more paranormal hotspots. We visit a castle outside of Seattle that is haunted by a suicidal monk, and an early American Inn near Boston.

programme.desc: The MythBusters build a trebuchet and attempt to save Buster's life with their favorite mechanical cure all: Duct Tape.

programme.title: MythBusters: Star Wars: Revenge of the Myth
programme.desc: The team tests if Luke really could swing himself and Leia across a chasm with only his belt-rigged grappling hook, could an Ewok log swing crush an Imperial "Chicken Walker" and could Luke survive in a tauntaun's belly?

programme.title: MythBusters: Star Wars: The Myths Strike Back
programme.desc: The myths strike back when Adam and Jamie once again confront the dark side of science in a workshop not so far, far away.

programme.title: BattleBots: Let the Big Bot Battle Begin
programme.desc: Witch Doctor, the2019 runner-up, starts their campaign against last year's breakout-bot Hydra. Titans Mammoth and Huge face off in an epic battle of the big bots and the elusive Black Dragon risks robotic life and limb against Kraken.

programme.title: BattleBots: Let the Big Bot Battle Begin
programme.desc: Witch Doctor starts its campaign against breakout-boy Hydra while Mammoth and Hugh face off in an epic big-bot battle. Later, Black Dragon risks it all to take on Kraken.

programme.title: BattleBots: Mega Fights: Rising Stars Battle!
programme.desc: Two rising stars attempt to advance as Gruff wields its dual-flamethrowers against Hypershock, and hammer-bot Beta is back to wage war against the deadliest horizontal spinner in the tournament, Rotator.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Swamp Monster
programme.desc: When an oil rig in Louisiana drills into something unexpected, a cataclysmic event is unleashed, causing a lake to suddenly disappear; experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: BattleBots: Mega Fights: Rising Stars Battle!
programme.desc: Two rising stars attempt to advance as Gruff wields its dual-flamethrowers against Hypershock, and hammer-bot Beta is back to wage war against the deadliest horizontal spinner in the tournament, Rotator.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Swamp Monster
programme.desc: When an oil rig in Louisiana drills into something unexpected, a cataclysmic event is unleashed, causing a lake to suddenly disappear; experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: BattleBots: Mega Fights: Last Bot Standing
programme.desc: It's championship night and just four bots remain to face off in the ultimate battles to decide the 2018 BattleBots World Champion.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Escobar's Castle
programme.desc: The ruins of a once-palatial compound contain the secrets of one of history's most notorious criminals. Plus, new discoveries reveal why this high-security estate was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The World's Strangest Disaster Zones
programme.desc: A deserted city half buried, whole villages swallowed by the earth, temples turned to rubble, and an arctic town facing a deadly threat. Within these structures are the echoes of history; each haunted shell now ready to tell its own story.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Ghost Park
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Children of Thunder
programme.desc: In the summer of 2000, panic overwhelms the Bay Area when bags full of body parts start appearing all over the region. Investigators follow the trail of grisly clues and it leads to the discovery of a secret cult carrying out a sinister scheme.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Freeway Phantom
programme.desc: In 1971 and '72, Washington DC is terrorized by a cunning killer who abducts and murders six young African American girls. Police and the community are outraged by the serial killings that target young children in their own neighborhoods.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Monster in the Desert
programme.desc: In 1992, a 19-year-old woman is brutally assaulted outside of Desert Hot Springs, California. Miraculously she escapes, but lives in constant fear that he will find her again one day. What the victim doesn't realize is she survived a serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: In the Name of Love
programme.desc: Pvt. Tracie McBride has just arrived for military intelligence training when she's kidnapped from a laundry room at Goodfellow Air Force Base in Texas. A hunt for the missing soldier leads to a tale of horror involving a decorated war vet.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Motor City Murder
programme.desc: In 1970's Detroit, a senseless murder rocks the African-American neighbourhood of the North End. Police think they've got the perpetrators and a jury agrees. But it will take 47 years for the truth to finally emerge and right history's wrongs.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: What Happened to Baby Lisa?
programme.desc: In 2011, a 10-month-old baby girl goes missing from her home in Kansas City. The family fears she's been kidnapped by a drifter, only to be accused by the police of being responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: Patty Hearst: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: In the chaos of the seventies, leftwing radicals take heiress Patty Hearst hostage and the media, too. While the FBI focuses their efforts on bank robbery charges, a murder goes unsolved. But the son of the slain Myrna Opsahl holds out for justice.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: What Happened to Baby Lisa?
programme.desc: In 2011, a 10-month-old baby girl goes missing from her home in Kansas City. The family fears she's been kidnapped by a drifter, only to be accused by the police of being responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: Patty Hearst: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: In the chaos of the seventies, leftwing radicals take heiress Patty Hearst hostage and the media, too. While the FBI focuses their efforts on bank robbery charges, a murder goes unsolved. But the son of the slain Myrna Opsahl holds out for justice.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Children of Thunder
programme.desc: In the summer of 2000, panic overwhelms the Bay Area when bags full of body parts start appearing all over the region. Investigators follow the trail of grisly clues and it leads to the discovery of a secret cult carrying out a sinister scheme.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone Girls
programme.desc: When three women from three different decades meet their death or go missing under mysterious circumstances, authorities are forced to examine the one thing they had in common: they all fell in love with the same man.

programme.title: Home Alone: Portrait of a Stalker
programme.desc: In 2007, 17-year old Katie is living in Tennessee with her doting parents. But Katie's been keeping secrets, and her parents are shocked to discover she's being stalked by an ex-boyfriend they didn't know existed.

programme.title: Home Alone: Silent Night, Holy Terror
programme.desc: In Alabama in 2010, sassy teenager Haley craves her independence, but her protective mom, Teresa, worries about the company she's keeping. Teresa convinces Haley to end her toxic relationship, but he won't let go until he gets what he wants.

programme.title: Home Alone: The Men Who Stole Christmas
programme.desc: In November 2009, Yei and John Daniels come home to find their house ransacked. Brushing it off, they decide to have the Christmas of a lifetime with their kids. A few days later a knock at the door changes their lives forever.

programme.title: The Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: When seven inmates at a Texas prison successfully escape two weeks before Christmas, they go on a crime spree that ends in one police officer dead and a showdown with US Marshals.

programme.title: A Christmas Party Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a high-flying corporate executive finds his wife dead after a raucous Christmas party, police suspect foul play and unearth the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Silent Night, Violent Night
programme.desc: Residents of a small village are shocked when lifelong resident Billie Cunningham is found murdered in her home. Right before the case goes cold, an unlikely killer comes forward with a shocking confession.

programme.title: A Christmas Mourning
programme.desc: 36-year-old Beverly Eller is killed just days before Christmas in her apartment in Griffin, Georgia, but her murder goes unsolved for years before an important piece of evidence reveals her killer.

programme.title: Murder Under the Mistletoe
programme.desc: Ed and Minnie Maurin vanish right before their annual Christmas party. After an exhausting search, their family's worst fear turns into a horrifying discovery.

programme.title: Nightmare Christmas
programme.desc: A naughty husband pays the price for opening his gifts five days early. Then, a Christmas Day caper sends a congregation into chaos when greedy Grinches make off with the church donations.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: A 30-year-old recent divorcee, Tammie, finds herself working two jobs to make ends meet. Her trusting nature and desire to be loved leave her vulnerable to deception, betrayal, and deadly consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: Do You Love Me?
programme.desc: Jeanne Smith and her two daughters, Marie and Anna, make for a tight-knit, family trio. But when Jeanne and Anna go looking for love in all the wrong places, it ends in heartbreak, lies, and murder.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: He's Back
programme.desc: When Natalie Purdie moves from New York City to Norfolk, Virginia, she quickly makes new friends both on and off her high school dance squad. But as Natalie's life revolves around dance, she has no idea a violent obsession revolves around her.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Sadistic Mastermind
programme.desc: A sadistic criminal mastermind forces his victims to make a cruel choice: rob a bank or watch their family die. The FBI will need to take extraordinary measures to bringing this villain down before a chilling prophecy is fulfilled.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Terrorist in Texas
programme.desc: The FBI's Joint Terrorism Task Force in Dallas, TX goes undercover to stop a homegrown terrorist from killing thousands of Americans. To neutralize this violent jihadist, the FBI will have to build a weapon of mass destruction of its own design.

programme.title: FBI Takedowns: Catching Crazy
programme.desc: A cop-shooting fugitive terrorizes banks in South Jersey. To smoke him out, the FBI teams with a local detective and an ex-cop informant. Even with the perfect trap, this crazy criminal isn't about to go down without a fight.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Smoking Guns
programme.desc: A classic western gunfight, a battle between a US naval patrol and a German U-Boat, a stagecoach bandit hell bent on revenge and a revolutionary tactic that turned the course of a war.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Great Escapes
programme.desc: Four stories highlighting great escapes; a monocular that helped save a stranded pilot; the rifle that helped a WWII hero cheat death; the hand-drawn map used to destroy SAM sites; and a Saint's medal that served as one scout pilot's lucky charm.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Courage Under Fire
programme.desc: Four stories of courage under fire; a symbol of luck saves Marines in Korea; a handheld weapon protects Europe during the Cold War; an instrument sends a ship off to its depths and a letter helps write victory during the Revolutionary War.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Heroes
programme.desc: Four stories of heroism; A golden statue for Marines shooting a battle; The medal of honor for a daring train robbery; A General's plans that led the U.S. into WWII; and a piece of paper that spells death for Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Franklin D. Roosevelt
programme.desc: Japanese bombers attack Pearl Harbor and sink a large part of the US Pacific Fleet. President Franklin D. Roosevelt decides it's time for the United States to strike back.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Charles de Gaulle
programme.desc: June 16, 1940. Paris has fallen to the Nazis and the German conquest of France is almost complete. Prime Minister Henri Petain plans to sign an armistice with Nazi Germany, but French General Charles de Gaulle secedes and rebels against the policy.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Nazis vs. Aliens
programme.desc: The incredible story of how Nazi scientists and UFOs combined to create technology that changed the world.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Restored: 1930s Spanish Colonial Ranch Revival
programme.desc: Brett takes on a Spanish Colonial Revival that has had all of the beautiful original woodwork covered over with layers of paint. It's painstaking work to bring it back and the team hits some serious snags.

programme.title: Restored: 1923 Mediterranean Revival
programme.desc: Brett's new clients recently purchased their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and want to restore it after years of small updates from the previous owners.

programme.title: Restored: The Riverside Transitional Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a Craftsman bungalow for a woman who had started the project with her late husband, but never finished. The homeowner is overwhelmed when she sees the house finally returned to its original beauty.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Victorian Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian Bungalow for a military veteran and his daughter. The project grows in scale when unexpected problems are discovered and it becomes a complete restoration.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Back to the Drawing Board
programme.desc: Clay and Clayton were thrilled to negotiate their house price lower based on the issues raised in their home inspection report. But now that they've put thousands of dollars and hours into repairs, they're discovering things the home inspector missed.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Terminated
programme.desc: Gail and Kevin were thrilled to find a house they could afford just minutes from their daughter's school. The inspector saw asbestos wrapped ducts, but the house was beautifully renovated so there was no need to disturb them.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Destined for Demo
programme.desc: Ashley is feeling extremely overwhelmed.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Weekender
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael aim to help restore Galveston's reputation as America's 'Playground of the South.'

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Coastal Cottage
programme.desc: Michael finds a 1931 craftsman bungalow that just came on the market which is near the beach and only $65,000.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beers, Burgers and Bocce in Baltimore
programme.desc: Actor and proud Baltimore native Josh Charles meets up with Michael at his favourite place for crab cakes in a town where everyone fights over where to find the very best. Then, they have a heated round of bocce ball in the Little Italy neighborhood.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bacon Knows Best
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon takes down a towering fortress of succulent ribs and a sandwich that's a meaty trifecta of juicy brisket, pork and sausage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Noah's Favs
programme.desc: Noah shares the greatest hits by taking a trip down the memory midway of his favourite carnival foods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Family Dinner
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe takes a seat at the table for family dinner, carnival style.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Local Legends
programme.desc: From sandwiches to desserts, Noah discovers foods that put cities on the map and some that present an entire state.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tons of Taters
programme.desc: Ingenious fair vendors use the humble potato to create some amazing and original midway food.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Oakland
programme.desc: Chef Jordan Andino checks out the Bay Area's biggest city, Oakland, California, and makes his first stop at Seawolf Public House for classic comfort foods with international flavors.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Memphis
programme.desc: Jordan Andinio fires up his evening with some Polynesian fare-gone Southern at Atomic Tiki in Memphis, a city known for BBQ and the blues, but there's much more to its late-night food scene.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Local Legends
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 15 of America's best dishes that have achieved local legend status. From sentimental favorites like deep-dish pizza, patty melts and spaghetti and meatballs to an old-fashioned clambake and lobster roll.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Cajun Cuisine
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 15 of America's best Cajun dishes, from classics like crawfish, jambalaya and gumbo to a few surprises.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roasting and Ranching in Texas
programme.desc: Roger takes a trip to West Point, Texas to meet Tink Pinkard, an outdoor guide and all-around nice guy.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cajun Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Texas and Louisiana to feast on classic Cajun cooking.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy for Chicken
programme.desc: Roger travels across Massachusetts to meet two chefs who are putting a brand new spin on fire-roasted, rotisserie chicken.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Food Traditions
programme.desc: Roger visits New England for two unique food traditions that celebrate family, friends and the community.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Love for Lobsters in Maine
programme.desc: In Maine, the love for lobsters runs deep and Roger visits two places where lobsters are cooked in the coolest, wood-fired cookers.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Foods in Jamaica
programme.desc: The search for fire and food takes us to Jamaica where we make a beeline for Scotchies's Too, a restaurant famous for cooking jerk pork and chicken.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pepper Popper Party
programme.desc: Noah Cappe challenges carnival concessionaires across America to feature everyone's favorite spicy bar snack in their offerings. From hot dogs and burgers to pizza and onion rings, even a dessert, these pepper popper creations are on fire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Classics Gone Wild
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe crosses the country in search of carnival classics gone wild! From a pumped-up corndog at the Porter County Fair to an out of this world funnel cake-blooming onion mashup at the Greater Gulf State Fair.

programme.title: Christmas Chowdown
programme.desc: Carla Hall has her table set for a food-filled holiday. Whether it's a Christmas tree made from a tower of waffles, a turducken turned into a mammoth po' boy or even the entire Feast of the Seven Fishes atop one pizza, 'tis the season for eating!

programme.title: Outlander: Eye of the Storm

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty

programme.title: Movie: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Repressed risk analyst Reuben Feffer keeps his life planned out perfectly until his new bride leaves him on their honeymoon. When a free-spirited former classmate comes back into his life, he re-evaluates his overly ordered universe.

programme.title: Movie: After the Sunset
programme.desc: Two thieves find their plans for retirement interrupted by a gangster and a vengeful agent.

programme.title: Movie: Little Black Book
programme.desc: A TV producer becomes suspicious after snooping through her boyfriend's palm pilot and decides to uncover the truth behind his past relationships.

programme.title: Movie: Little Women
programme.desc: Four young women making the transition to adulthood lean on each other for support. When aspiring author Jo's novel is repeatedly rejected by publishers, her editor advises her write about the thing that she knows best -- her relationship with her family.

programme.title: Movie: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Repressed risk analyst Reuben Feffer keeps his life planned out perfectly until his new bride leaves him on their honeymoon. When a free-spirited former classmate comes back into his life, he re-evaluates his overly ordered universe.

programme.title: Outlander: America the Beautiful
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie cross paths with Stephen Bonnet, a pirate and smuggler who enlists their help. Claire illuminates Jamie on some of America's history, leading him to wonder if it's possible for hem to lay down roots.

programme.title: Outlander: Do No Harm
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie visit his Aunt Jocasta at her plantation, River Run. When tragedy strikes at the plantation, Jamie and Claire find themselves caught between what's right and the law of the land.

programme.title: Outlander: The False Bride
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire search for a place to call home. Meanwhile, in the 20th century, Brianna and Roger's romance heats up and then fizzles during a road trip that winds up highlighting their differences.

programme.title: Outlander: Common Ground

programme.title: Outlander: Savages

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of My Blood

programme.title: Outlander: Down the Rabbit Hole

programme.title: Outlander: Wilmington

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor

programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game

programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Once Bitten, Twice Tried
programme.desc: Bite marks on a murder victims’ body twice lead to Ray Krone's conviction, but the DNA evidence tells another story.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: NYE Foul Play
programme.desc: In 1995, Hank Skinner was sentenced to death for a New Year's Eve triple-homicide of his family. Five years later, students from the Northwestern University start to examine the case and discover that key evidence was not examined for DNA.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers
programme.desc: Three young brothers are reported missing the day after Thanksgiving. In a shocking twist, their daddy claims he gave them to an underground group -- but investigators say his story doesn’t add up.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: John Lennon Assassination
programme.desc: In 1980, the entire world was stunned by the murder of John Lennon. Was Mark Chapman a cold-blooded killer or a seriously deranged young man? We will backtrack through the lives of both men to set the scene through interviews and footage.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Murder in Vegas
programme.desc: A burnt antique trunk was found in the Nevada desert in 1995, filled with charred bones and a skull with five bullet holes. Investigators convicted the killer with help from a method used in the era of Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: George Michael's Final Days
programme.desc: George Michael's life as international super star came to a mysterious and tragic end on Christmas Eve 2016. Family and fans were shocked by his sudden death. What happened the night he died?

programme.title: BattleBots: Let the Big Bot Battle Begin
programme.desc: The 2019 runner-up Witch Doctor starts their campaign against last year's breakout-bot Hydra. Titans Mammoth and Huge face off in an epic battle of the big bots and the elusive Black Dragon risks robotic life and limb against Kraken.

programme.title: BattleBots: Stop! Hammer Time!
programme.desc: Legendary hammer-bot Beta returns to face off with Rotator, one of the deadliest horizontal spinners on the planet. Later, two rising stars attempt to stake their claim in the contest as Gruff pits its dual-flamethrowers against Hypershock.

programme.title: BattleBots: Blood, Sweat and Gears
programme.desc: Former Giant Nut winner Tombstone takes on rookie Slap Box and the part-frog, part-killer robot Ribbot takes on the feline-inspired MadCatter. Giant walker-bot Chomp makes its debut and End Game takes on Bloodsport in a messy main event.

programme.title: BattleBots: Blood, Sweat and Gears

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Full Stream Ahead
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores Discovery's brand-new streaming platform, discovery+, with some of its biggest stars including David Schwimmer, Mike Rowe, Faruq Tauheed of Battlebots as well as Freddy Dodge and Juan Ibarra from Gold Rush.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Bearanoia
programme.desc: The Raneys rush to a failing homestead in Colorado where they find husband Don makes a 40-mile mountain commute each day, leaving his wife alone, terrified to leave the house because it's surrounded by bears and mountain lions.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Abandoned and Alone
programme.desc: In Montana, the Raneys help Beth and Mike Ettinger who live in an abandoned ghost town where many previous homesteaders failed. Survival is a battle on this homestead that is stalked by a mountain lion and void of any livestock, water or food.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The Raneys kick off an ambitious rescue on their 40 acres. Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get gear to their homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: One if by River, Two if by Air
programme.desc: An aerial supply mission faces turbulent skies as Marty breaks ground on massive foundation posts for his cabin. Misty and Maciah begin an innovative greenhouse that requires lumber, but Matt and Katie must first troubleshoot the new sawmill.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Raney Days Are A-Comin'
programme.desc: With only two weeks left to finish their ambitious self-rescue, Marty races to complete the walls of the log cabin. Misty expands the garden and builds a goat shelter, while Matt takes the next generation on a hunt for gold.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Do Or Die
programme.desc: Marty struggles to finish the cliff-top cabin; the family risks another river crossing to get materials across for a final crucial build.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty works to overhaul the entire base of the cabin. Misty constructs a greenhouse out of scavenged windows, and Matt builds a workshop for the Oglesbys' leather goods business.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trust or Die
programme.desc: The Deeters are dog-mushers with a homestead on the edge of disaster. Bears dine on the dog food and the forest around them is a deadly tinder box. The Raneys must push them to make drastic changes, but discover the Deeters don't trust outsiders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Smoky Mountain Fury
programme.desc: In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. The Raneys race to shore up key structures and establish a viable homestead business before the next big storm.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Grizzly Bait
programme.desc: Arctic temperatures and a hungry grizzly wreak havoc on a struggling homestead. The Raneys leap to action with huge builds including a blacksmith shop, but tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Over-Juiced
programme.desc: A older man's small injury takes an unexpected turn. A juice diet causes major problems for a health enthusiast.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Radioactive Rocks
programme.desc: A dialysis patient is bleeding and doctors can't get it to stop. A naked man falls into a cactus and is covered head to toe in needles. A patient brings radioactive rocks to the hospital causing chaos in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Size Matters
programme.desc: A woman risks losing her finger after trying on an ill-fitting engagement ring. A body builder can't breathe and doctors are shocked to discover why. A doctor takes a break outside and is nearly struck by a car driven by her next patient.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Oh, Deer!
programme.desc: A college student's head is impaled by a trophy deer's antlers. A car crash victim leads the doctor to believe her baby may still be at the accident scene. A nurse's ex-boyfriend brings his new girlfriend to the ER, and the nurse must help save her life.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Drama Mama
programme.desc: The real reason behind a teenager's bulging tummy and stomach pains shocks nurses, doctors and even her meddling mom. A delirious man yelling for his 'car' reveals clues about his own attempted murder, and a college co-ed mysteriously stops breathing.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Punched!
programme.desc: An injured ER doctor puts on a show to stop a patient's violent outbursts; a man's heart fails as his daughter and girlfriend fight; on Christmas Eve, the family of a patient with severe burns prays for a miracle.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Belly Dancer Mystery
programme.desc: A belly dancer collapses while working at a hookah bar. An ER doctor must quickly learn a new skill to mend an elderly patient and bring his bickering family together. A six-year-old girl is having seizures and no one knows what the cause is.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Bridesmaid Meltdown
programme.desc: A bridesmaid falls into a coma after drinking too much. A premature infant is abandoned at the hospital and must quickly be revived.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Holiday Party
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invite you inside their festive shindig, alongside their beloved crew. It's one event you won't want to miss, chock-full of bonus footage, behind-the-scenes banter, and special gifts, for Sal, anyway.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Pizza Episode
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bathroom Break

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Doomed

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Statue of Limitations

programme.desc: At a local copy shop, Michael introduces a print-by-hand technique, and at a bait tackle shop, he unveils the latest fish fashion trends. Finally, at an office, Michael pulls a switcheroo and the new temp has no idea who's the boss.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: EggShaq
programme.desc: Michael unveils the mystery behind bowling balls and does the world’s longest spit-take. Plus, Shaquille O'Neal helps with a plan to blow one superfan's mind.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dead Man Walking?
programme.desc: While posing as a cook, Michael warms up his voice to serenade a clam out of its shell. Plus, a spirited trick leaves one man questioning the afterlife.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Human Pinata
programme.desc: The guys hug it out with strangers in the park, go head-to-head pitching wacky inventions to confused consumers, and launch a manhunt for their imaginary wives.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sweat the Small Things
programme.desc: Teaching an art class never looked so, bad. A dartboard and a home invasion have the contestants stressed and competitive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Nationals Disaster
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q fumble through the aisles of a grocery store and re-gift the kooky contents of a mystery bag. Then, the guys must seek out the chosen one, in an embarrassing needle-in-a-haystack challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr feel the wrath of disapproving focus groups after nonsensical presentations, and try to reach out and touch strangers at the mall with anything but their hands. Plus, the guys must quit their job in front of a crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Clash of the Jokers
programme.desc: In this competitive episode, Sal, Joe, Q and Murr battle head-to-head in fierce joker vs. joker challenges. The guys go two-on-two as they conduct focus groups where they focus mostly on making things uncomfortable.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Up Loser's Creek
programme.desc: The jokers make some tough calls at a telemarketing agency that leaves everyone wondering if they're just phoning it in. Then, the guys' intentions get wishy-washy at a fountain in the mall. Plus, Q and Sal tap into their spiritual side down at the shore.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dream Crusher
programme.desc: The guys try to kiss unsuspecting strangers until a special guest crashes the party, they focus-group their absurd life stories as potential movies, and the big loser gets a room-full of enemies while judging a kids' talent show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The guys freeze out skaters at an ice rink's rental counter, and head to the mall where they have the audacity to ask strangers to mind their manners. Then, tonight's loser is down for the count after donning a diaper for a sumo-sized punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bathroom Break
programme.desc: The guys get sassy while posing as auto parts salesmen, then head to the mall where they try to reel in unsuspecting shoppers. Tonight's big loser is stuck in a horrible mess after being locked inside a rigged bathroom of horrors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blind Justice
programme.desc: The guys get a little punchy while giving boxing lessons, then head to the mall to share the gift of music with strangers. When tonight’s loser delivers the right speech to the wrong audience, he’s the one who gets scared straight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The guys teach a crash course in sorry behaviour, ask strangers to settle bizarre debates and spread surprisingly good news at the mall. Plus, tonight’s loser has his hands tied when a day at the park turns into a frightful mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Doomed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr take in more than they bargained for while working at a tailor shop, then convince strangers to hand over their cellphones. Plus, tonight's big loser sacrifices his childhood for a punishment three months in the making.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Red Hot
programme.desc: A smokehouse master and a Californian take on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Chop of the Mornin' to Ya
programme.desc: There's expertise in spades when Chopped regular Amanda Freitag and digital darling Laura Vitale arrive in Bobby Flay's arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Family Matters
programme.desc: It's a family affair when father-and-son chefs Beto and Julian Rodarte battle it out to prove that the only thing stronger than family is their desire to beat Bobby Flay! Cookbook author Daphne Oz and model Jourdan Dunn judge.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Say Cheese!
programme.desc: Seasoned farmer and chef Duskie Estes goes up against pasta heir Francesco Buitoni to put Bobby Flay out to pasture. It's up to Giada de Laurentis and Sunny Anderson to choose the chef that will plow Bobby down.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Old Friends
programme.desc: Familiar faces return to the arena when restaurateurs and Beat Bobby Flay judges Michael Psilakis and Einat Admony compete to bring the heat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Off to the Races
programme.desc: Chef Josh Capon and sports reporter Carolyn Manno team up to make sure Bobby Flay doesn't try for a trick play. Haitian chef Jouvens Jean takes on Francophile and Seattle restaurateur Bruce Naftaly to beat Bobby at his own game.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Flame-tastic
programme.desc: Bobby Flay's good friends Michael Symon and Alex Guarnaschelli are back in the arena and looking to fire up a win. Armando Litiatco and Mikala Brennan battle for a chance to smoke Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Funny or Fried
programme.desc: Food Network's Alton Brown and Amanda Freitag ensure there's no funny business when Napa Valley's Gregory Wiener and comedian Daphne Brogdon compete to boo Bobby Flay out of his kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Break a Plate!
programme.desc: Two Italian-cuisine cutthroats, chefs Adam Leonti and Anthony Scolaro, face off for a shot at scuffing up Bobby's record with a loss. Rachael Ray and Damaris Phillips determine who has the sauce to take on the boss.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Pioneering Ordeal
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli links up with the Pioneer Woman, Ree Drummond, to orchestrate a loss. Two southern gentlemen, Atlanta's Jamarium Banks and Vince Giancarlo from Charlotte, North Carolina won't be playing nice as they try to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby vs. Food
programme.desc: Food Network Star winner Eddie Jackson brings in the ultimate battle buddy, Man vs. Food's Casey Webb, to throw all the manpower they can at Bobby Flay. Fine dining expert Eric Bolyard and seafood aficionado Sarah Wade duke it out for a shot at Bobby vs.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Cheese Stands Alone
programme.desc: The Kitchen's Sunny Anderson and chef Giada De Laurentiis teams up again to bring the heat to Bobby Flay's kitchen. The dynamic duo has recruited Indian chef Paddy Rawal and Caribbean specialist chef Trey Lamont to set Bobby's kitchen ablaze.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: That's Amore
programme.desc: Food Network Star winner Christian Petroni teams up with chef Carla Hall and brings two dynamic chefs who have mastered the food of his motherland, Italy.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Fiddle Around!
programme.desc: Fine-dining master Chef Geoff Lazlo faces off against Cincinnati legend Chef Daniel Wright, and both want to see Bobby Flay go up in smoke. Chef Josh Capon is joined by actress Teri Hatcher to make sure the chefs have the firepower to win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Sugarcoat It
programme.desc: Best Baker's Marcela Valladolid pairs up with the Cake Boss himself, Buddy Valastro, to try and score a sweet victory against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Go Nuts!
programme.desc: Christmas Cookie Challenge pals Ree Drummond and Eddie Jackson join forces to decide who has what it takes to get the job done against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Macaron Stackaron
programme.desc: The French macaron is the new cupcake, so the seven remaining kid bakers must take on this extremely demanding dessert, producing three dozen colourful macarons and stacking them to at least five inches high.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Hottest Dogs
programme.desc: From a half-pound kielbasa smothered in Swiss cheese to an all-beef dog stuffed with smoked brisket, these restaurants are all about delicious dogs and sizzling sausages.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Flavor Fiesta!
programme.desc: From spicy Chilean pork ribs in the Pacific Northwest to a Puerto Rican pork-tacular down in Georgia, diners are finding south-of-the-border flavor without ever leaving the States.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Eat Like a Local: California
programme.desc: From authentic tacos and first-class pizza to succulent seafood paella and beer can chicken, these dishes all come with a side of great weather, breathtaking scenery and the laid-back vibes of the Golden State.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Spicy to Icy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's heating up with some spice and cooling off with some ice. In Palm Springs, Calif., a barbecue joint pilin' up the meats and firin' up their 'flamethrower.'

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Home Delivery
programme.desc: Guy meets virtually with four chefs who walk him through one of their dishes with ingredients they've sent him. In this episode there's primo pork from New Hampshire, California chicken parm, Minneapolis pizza and tuna all the way from Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Family Style
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is taking a seat at some family restaurants. He stops at a sibling-run Vietnamese place in Utah serving authentic dishes using family recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Roots
programme.desc: Guy digs into dishes with a personal connection, including a Jewish deli in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Timeless Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy gets the lowdown on some longstanding traditions. In Philadelphia, the Jamaican joint going all out authentic with the jerk chicken.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Swimming With Manta Rays
programme.desc: Robert travels to Australia's Great Barrier Reef to help conduct research on manta rays. The Zoo's Rescue Unit, Wildlife Hospital and Volunteers team up to save a baby wallaby struggling to survive. Bindi gets up close and personal with Archie the Dingo.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Pawing Terri's Heart
programme.desc: Terri attends Charlie the tiger's exam to determine if his tumours were successfully treated. Bindi and the Small Mammal Team help develop a vaccine for Eden the Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi and the Otters
programme.desc: Wes and Robert remove eggs from the nest of saltwater crocs Terra and Bosco, in a nerve-wracking but necessary venture. Bindi tends to the training of otters Percival and Daisy, and Terri makes a Zoo Volunteer's dream come true.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Steve's Croc Mission Lives On
programme.desc: The family makes their annual trip to the Steve Irwin Wildlife Reserve to capture, study and release wild crocodiles. They continue the mission started by Steve & Terri, providing scientific research vital to the protection of Australia's apex predators.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bosco the Croc's Big Move
programme.desc: Robert takes on the challenging task of relocating Bosco, the most aggressive croc at the zoo. Bindi must investigate Forest the giraffe's bad knee problem. Terri helps Harley the koala find love at the end of a difficult breeding season.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert's Python Swim
programme.desc: Robert gets in the water with Gloria, a 12-foot reticulated python, to swim alongside her for the first time in the Crocoseum. Bindi welcomes home two orphaned kangaroo joeys, while Terri helps release a rescued wedge-tailed eagle back into the wild.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Oscar the Grouchy Frogmouth
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Big Day for Baby Rhino
programme.desc: Terri helps prepare the zoo's new baby rhino to receive a lifesaving vaccine. Robert is on a rescue mission to save two black swans in very bad shape. Bindi tries to determine if a cranky wombat named Poa might be pregnant.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Crocodile Love Story
programme.desc: It's moving day for Acco, the zoo's biggest crocodile. All goes to plan until his mate Cassie goes into hiding as the team races to reunite the bonded pair in their new enclosure. The rescue unit fights to save a flying fox entangled in barbed wire.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Road Trip Rescue
programme.desc: Carrying three baby kangaroos and an emu, the Irwins caravan into the Australian Outback to release the animals on Mourachan, their giant wildlife conservation property. Plans shift when they discover more animals in need of rescue along the way.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bosco the Croc's Big Move
programme.desc: Robert takes on the challenging task of relocating Bosco, the most aggressive croc at the zoo. Bindi must investigate Forest the giraffe's bad knee problem. Terri helps Harley the koala find love at the end of a difficult breeding season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World
programme.desc: A baby klipspringer is born on one of the coldest nights of the season and is miraculously nursed back to health. The California condor team at the Safari Park goes to unbelievable lengths to save this highly endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: An Elephant's Trust
programme.desc: Trust and experience are put to the test when an elephant requires delicate veterinary treatment from her keepers. Endangered pink pigeons need all the help they can get to produce offspring. Monty the adorable otter needs to visit the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: Training Dragons
programme.desc: The squirrel monkeys play hard-to-get with the Children's Zoo's keepers, a pair of Komodo dragons meet for the first time with explosive results and the Inca terns prepare for their first big flight.

programme.title: The Zoo: Velcro the Incredible
programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Additional Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a house in Long Beach, CA, with tons of potential. To justify their investment, they decide to add a bedroom and bath.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Broken Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house with a weird vibe in Anaheim, CA. From the start, they can't tell if someone is squatting in the house or if the neighborhood hoodlums are pranking them.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fish Out of Water
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a flip in West Covina, CA, a new area for them. They have to expand into new cities to grow their business, but the distance and uncertainty of what buyers there expect lead to disagreements on the scope and design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Buyer's Remorse
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a smoking deal on a Yorba Linda, CA, home. They spend big money to remove a fireplace, but when Tarek goes behind Christina's back and changes a tile design, she tackles the new fireplace herself.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Back House Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a small house in Lakewood, CA, to flip quickly. However, when they discover an unpermitted addition, they are faced with a dilemma of bringing the addition up to code or tearing down the nicest part of the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Better Be Quick
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take out an expensive loan to flip a house in Fountain Valley, CA. A tight timeline pressures them to flip the house quickly.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Busy Flip
programme.desc: When a good deal pops up, Tarek and Christina check out a home in La Mirada, California. What looks to be a quick flip soon turns out to be more difficult, however.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Stiff Competition
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in the upscale neighborhood of North Tustin, CA, but find competition from other investors. They'll need to act quickly or lose out.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cut and Run
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a Laguna Hills, CA, house in a cookie-cutter neighbourhood. When they arrive at the home, they find torn-up drywall and missing exterior siding, making them wonder why someone would leave the property in such a hurry.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Far Out Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are lured to North Hollywood, CA, by a 1930s Spanish home. They want to appeal to trendy Los Angeles buyers by preserving the historic architecture, but the home's inconvenient distance causes unexpected issues during renovations.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Covered Costs
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a risk on an unseen house in Orange, California, but they soon discover it's been vandalized and the owners covered a gross pool in the backyard. As more issues pop up, Tarek and Christina worry they won't recoup their costs.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a small house in Lakewood, CA, to flip quickly. However, when they discover an unpermitted addition, they are faced with a dilemma of bringing the addition up to code or tearing down the nicest part of the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Better Be Quick
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take out an expensive loan to flip a house in Fountain Valley, CA. A tight timeline pressures them to flip the house quickly.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Battle for Bedrooms
programme.desc: It's a bedroom add-on challenge, as Going For Sold's Jon and Mary are up against layout issues as they try to add a bedroom to a Houston home while staying in the original footprint. Flip or Flop's Anita and Ken face the challenge of using an addition.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Water vs. Fire
programme.desc: In this head-to-head, house flipping challenge, 'Good Bones' Mina and Karen take on Lindsey and Eric from 'Desert Flippers' to see whose investment will lead to the biggest profit.

programme.title: Home Town: The Move of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Robyn and Cassidy want to move Robyn's great-grandmother's house to a new plot of land, but Ben and Erin are sceptical that the home could survive the move.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Sophistication
programme.desc: A couple that's moving back to Mississippi is looking for a spacious home for under $260,000 where they can host friends and throw parties.

programme.title: Home Town: Southern Coastal Style
programme.desc: With an all-in budget of $300,000, a couple is ready to move back home to Mississippi and put down roots after years of moving for work. They need help finding a home with charm and character in a small town.

programme.title: Home Town: Everybody Wants a Porch
programme.desc: A couple moves from Arizona to Mississippi in search of a slower pace of life and their forever home. They have an all-in budget of $250,000 and a wish list that includes a home with historic Southern architecture and a spacious kitchen.

programme.title: Home Town: A Second Chance
programme.desc: When a tornado rips through Laurel, the home Ben and Erin renovated for Nancy and Richard T Jones is severely damaged. They vow to not only restore it to its pre-tornado condition, but to re-imagine it.

programme.title: Home Town: Small Town Life Awaits
programme.desc: A Canadian couple looks to purchase a vacation home that will one day become their retirement home. With an all-in budget of $140,000, Ben and Erin show them two Craftsman cottages.

programme.title: Home Town: Fire and Water
