programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: A Noise in the Night
programme.desc: Sisters Bre and Kayli Lasley have just moved into the perfect apartment in downtown Salt Lake City, unaware that a recent parolee is living close by. That is until one quiet night when suddenly their lives cross paths in an explosive way.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: Come with Me
programme.desc: After a failed relationship, 22-year-old Jennifer Hitchcock thinks she may have finally found that special someone when she meets Maurice Mason. But as soon as Maurice moves in, she can't help but feel as though someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Shelia Dates and her daughter Regina are more than blood relatives - they're best friends and roommates too. But one morning, their lives are irrevocably changed the moment two unexpected guests appear at their doorstep.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: The Night Shift
programme.desc: Single mother Barbara Nunn relocates to Florida, but she struggles to find her way. After she lands a job at a local diner, it appears her troubles are finally behind her. But then one night, a surprise confrontation with customers ends in murder.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: No Escape
programme.desc: When Peggy Klinke returns to school to pursue her dream of becoming a doctor, she catches the eye of fellow student Patrick Kennedy. But their relationship eventually leads them down a terrifying path of jealousy, obsession, and murder.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: Never Let Go
programme.desc: Karen Widdoss thinks she's finally rid of her possessive ex-boyfriend Leonard. But months into dating a new man, she can't shake the feeling she's being watched. When a stalker does step out of hiding, he doesn't look at all like she imagined.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: Danger In Store
programme.desc: After a bad breakup, single mom Joi Partain finds love again with Jonathan Pearson. But after the couple moves to Ocala, Florida with Joi's daughter, troubles in their relationship spiral until they hit a bloody, brutal point of no return.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: He's Back
programme.desc: When Natalie Purdie moves from New York City to Norfolk, Virginia, she quickly makes new friends both on and off her high school dance squad. But as Natalie's life revolves around dance, she has no idea a violent obsession revolves around her.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: Never Saw It Coming
programme.desc: A 30-year-old recent divorcee, Tammie, finds herself working two jobs to make ends meet. Her trusting nature and desire to be loved leave her vulnerable to deception, betrayal, and deadly consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Shelia Dates and her daughter Regina are more than blood relatives - they're best friends and roommates too. But one morning, their lives are irrevocably changed the moment two unexpected guests appear at their doorstep.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare Before Christmas: The Night Shift
programme.desc: Single mother Barbara Nunn relocates to Florida, but she struggles to find her way. After she lands a job at a local diner, it appears her troubles are finally behind her. But then one night, a surprise confrontation with customers ends in murder.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Reeling from the death of their mother, Annie and Jessica Andrews perform a séance to see if they can contact her spirit. Soon after, strange things start happening in the house.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Locked Away
programme.desc: After a college graduate goes missing from her parents' home, investigators must rely on quick thinking and cunning police work, as they race against the clock to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: Dead North: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: When Christopher Regan goes missing in the Upper Peninsula of Michigan, police chief Laura Frizzo is in a race against time to find him.

programme.title: Dead North: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: In the case of missing man Christopher Regan, Chief Laura Frizzo is hot in pursuit of two suspects. Chris' lover Kelly Cochran and her husband Jason.

programme.title: Dead North: Spring Thaw
programme.desc: After their house is searched, Kelly and Jason Cochran, the top suspects in Chris Regan's disappearance, skip town. A few months later, one of them is murdered.

programme.title: Dead North: Spring Thaw
programme.desc: Jason Cochran one of the top suspects in the Chris Regan disappearance is dead. Police Chief Laura Frizzo is on a mission to arrest his wife Kelly Cochran for the murder of Chris Regan.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Killing Field
programme.desc: In February, a teenage couple mysteriously disappears leaving two families devastated. When their car turns up abandoned and burnt in a field, everyone's desperate for answers. But winter's thaw reveals the hideous truth that shocks the community.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Nightmare in North Dakota
programme.desc: After a blizzard, a son visits his parents, only to find them heinously murdered. Detectives discover a crime scene hopelessly compromised. They soon cross paths with a peculiar local, who may know what happened during the snowstorm.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Midnight Mass
programme.desc: In Evansville, Indiana, a family of four is murdered in their home. Detectives launch a manhunt to find the deranged killer.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Weeks after the Christmas disappearance of 22-year-old Dean Fawcett, detectives discover a headless body in the snow. A handwritten note points to a dangerous set of suspects, setting investigators on a cross-country manhunt to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Silent Night
programme.desc: A married, father-of-three wakes up to every parent's worst nightmare - his youngest child dead, his daughter missing, and his son barely clinging to life. Will investigators be able to find the cold-hearted monster that brutally attacked this family?

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Blizzard of Bullets
programme.desc: During chilling winter nights in Idaho, a madman is on the prowl... attacking citizens in a crime spree that stuns families and terrifies whole communities. Investigators must race against time to catch a killer... who kills for the thrill of it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Ancient Astronauts
programme.desc: The idea of ancient astronauts goes back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenged religion and science. Find out who his enemies were, what his influences were, and why he was jailed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: Learn that our Halloween's origins aren't all that ancient and that Edgar Allan Poe is not the madman that others have made him out to be.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, it's time to rethink Hollywood's vision of the old west and learn about the truth behind some of America's renowned rivalries.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run With My Buddy
programme.desc: Larry McClendon, while in prison for murder, escapes with seven others. Larry is forced to be creative in his evasion of the cops; hiding in abandoned shacks, and muddy pigpens, and even dressing as a woman as a disguise.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Lock and Load
programme.desc: A Texas separatist group takes two hostages. Rangers are able to negotiate the release, however two members, Richard Keyes and Mike Matson get away, evading helicopters and dogs. Using an underground militia group, Keyes hides out in the woods undetected.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a War Vet
programme.desc: Posing as a veteran and preying on women to get cash, cars, and even a house, Jerrod Durr finds himself in a multistate game of cat and mouse with cops.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught by a Cougar
programme.desc: Robert Spencer has just shot his girlfriend. He is a thug and drug dealer, who in a blind panic gets high and goes on the run, living every day as a party. He finds the affection of a friend's mother, which ultimately leads to his arrest.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot Above a Deli
programme.desc: What was planned as an easy robbery turns into The Carnegie Deli Murders. Sean Salley shoots an actress and her friends above a deli in New York, and flees to New Orleans and then to Miami where he plans to leave the country for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Dumped
programme.desc: The main suspect in the murder of a pregnant ex-girlfriend, and wanted for the shooting of a current one, Michael Alfonso is a jealous boyfriend who time and again turns to violence. It is Alfonso's criminal lifestyle that gets him caught.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got the Wrong Four People Killed
programme.desc: Scott Burnside hires a hit man to kill a friend's wife. But when the hit goes wrong, and four people are found murdered, Burnside flees to a remote island. On the run, Scott is unable to adjust to his lonely life. His family ties tip the Feds.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Lot of Pot
programme.desc: Moving small amounts of pot from Mexico lead to a bustling operation for Steve Lamb. By age 20, Lamb was part of a group of traffickers who made millions. Eluding the police, Lamb moved bails of marijuana across the sea until caught in a sting operation.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.desc: We're paying tribute to the best styles, cuts and steakhouses serving up the best steaks. Chef Jonathon Sawyer takes us on a trip to Dayton for a ribeye cut so incredibly, it's fit for a king.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Aruba
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of Aruba, where the climate is as warm as the people. He indulges in local favorites like hearty Dutch pea soup, comforting yet elegant seafood cazuela and sweet, buttery cashew cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Baja
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern returns to the European epicenter of fashion, art and commerce. Paris is home to rich and masterful cuisine, and Andrew finds the best places to get everything from traditional pot au feu topped with with bone marrow to fresh steak tartare.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: The Hamptons
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the seafood masterworks of the Hamptons. From delectable surf and turf to buttery lobster rolls, clam chowder to smoked bluefish pate, the Hamptons' dinner scene is sizzling.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern finds that you can still get a taste of the Wild West in the food of Denver, offering a goldmine of flavours from the past and present.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Wisconsin
programme.desc: Andrew visits America's Dairy Land, but he finds out there's a lot more going on with the food in Wisconsin than meets the eye. Andrew finds that Wisconsinites are finding new ways to do things the old fashioned way. He discovers the science behind milk.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: NBA: The Jump
programme.desc: Daily NBA discussion featuring the latest news and stories with a panel of NBA analysts and current players.

programme.title: The Best of This Is SportsCenter: 25 Years and Counting
programme.desc: The best moments from the first 25 years of ESPN’s iconic This is SportsCenter commercial campaign, including the best of Stuart Scott and the evolution of the SportsCenter studio.

programme.title: The Best of This Is SportsCenter: The Superstars
programme.desc: From LeBron to Serena to Peyton Manning, the best moments from the greatest athletes to appear in ESPN’s iconic This is SportsCenter commercial campaign.

programme.title: SportsCenter Special: Franchise in Crisis: The Washington Football Team
E:60: Alex Smith: Project 11
programme.desc: An exclusive look inside Washington quarterback Alex Smith's recovery from a 2018 leg injury that nearly cost him his life. Smith opens up about flesh-eating bacteria, limb salvage measures and what it was like to throw a football again.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Drew Bledsoe: Better With Age
programme.desc: An unfiltered interview with former number one draft pick Drew Bledsoe, on living in the shadow of the Tom Brady dynasty, the tackle that nearly cost him his life and how he's found peace as a successful winemaker.

programme.title: Jalen & Jacoby
programme.desc: Jalen Rose and David Jacoby give the people what they want, breaking down the latest in sports and pop culture as only they can.

programme.desc: St. Louis Cardinals legends, including Whitey Herzog and Ozzie Smith, describe how the 1980s Cardinals used electrifying speed, outstanding defense and strong pitching to win three National League pennants and the 1982 World Series championship.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: The 1995 Mariners, Saving Baseball in Seattle
programme.desc: As the Seattle Mariners entered its 19th season in 1995, the team was at a crossroads and there was a strong possibility the team would leave Seattle. Ken Griffey Jr., Randy Johnson and the 1995 Mariners helped reinvigorate baseball in the city.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: The Bird
programme.desc: A documentary about eccentric Detroit Tigers rookie, Mark Fidrych, who captivated fans and teammates thanks to his unusual antics on the pitching mound.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: Only in Hollywood
programme.desc: The story of the 1988 World Series Champion Los Angeles Dodgers narrated by award-winning actor Bryan Cranston.

programme.title: Pac-12 Football in 60
programme.desc: A no-huddle, fast and furious version of Pac-12 football condensed into an action-packed hour. 2019

programme.title: Pac-12 Football in 60
programme.desc: A no-huddle, fast and furious version of Pac-12 football condensed into an action-packed hour.

programme.title: The 12 Greatest: California Football Players
programme.desc: Count down the top 12 student-athletes from each Pac-12 school.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Play That Changed College Football
programme.desc: Look at the inaugural SEC championship game in 1992 and the impact it's had on college football.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Herschel Walker
programme.desc: Herschel Walker's career in the SEC was legendary, but his journey off the field was filled with struggle, pain, and ultimately, redemption.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Book of Manning
programme.desc: Written into the pages of football folklore is the Manning legend, a story started by patriarch, Archie, with chapters featuring his sons, Cooper, Peyton and Eli. Director Rory Karpf explores how a tragedy shaped the course of their lives.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Believer
programme.desc: This profile of Steve Spurrier looks at his close ties to the SEC as a young fan, a Heisman Trophy winning quarterback and an accomplished coach.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Color Orange: The Condredge Holloway Story
programme.desc: Condredge Holloway became the first African American quarterback in the SEC.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Before They Were Cowboys
programme.desc: Jerry Jones and Jimmy Johnson teamed up to help lead the 1964 Arkansas Razorbacks football squad to its only undefeated season in history, long before they joined forces to win two Super Bowls with the NFL Dallas Cowboys.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Tigers United
programme.desc: When Michael Sam announced on February 9, 2014 that he was gay, he became football's first openly gay active player. For most, the revelation was a surprise. For his teammates, it was not news. Michael had found acceptance in the Tigers football family.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Repeat After Us
programme.desc: Florida's big five return for the 2007 season to become the first school to repeat as basketball national champions with the same starting lineup.

programme.title: SEC Storied: King George
programme.desc: George Washington Rogers, winner of the Heisman Trophy in 1980, tells the story of his life.

programme.title: SEC Storied: In Search of Derrick Thomas
programme.desc: Derrick Thomas was a legendary college pass rusher and talented linebacker in the NFL before an accident at 33 years old took his life. See how his legacy continues to influence the world years later.

programme.title: SEC Storied: By Grantland Rice
programme.desc: There is no more hallowed figure in sports journalism than Grantland Rice, who maintained a ruling perch across the sports world for more than 50 years. This film relives sport's golden era through the eyes of a reporter who had a front row seat.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part One: 1869-1932
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's south is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the north: football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Two: 1933-1959
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the 1950s. In 1958, LSU won with star running back Billy Cannon leading the way, and a year later Cannon had epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Three: 1960-1970
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the civil rights movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region. Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama, and of SEC football.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Jim Won't Eat
programme.desc: When Mike's mom, Peggy, needs gallbladder surgery, she shocks Molly by asking her to take care of her dog. Meanwhile, Molly is thrown when Mike starts talking about being buried next to her when he dies.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Richie's Song
programme.desc: Carrie refuses to double date with Richie and his obnoxious cheating wife, Marie.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the High Holidays
programme.desc: Desperate for a way to pay their overdue rent, Max and Caroline get involved with a group of sketchy customers willing to pay top dollar for their cupcakes.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackeé Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Black-ish: Charlie in Charge
programme.desc: While Dre and Bow take Zoey on a trip to visit Bow's alma mater, Brown University, Dre battles with his fear of flying through a little pharmaceutical assistance to get him through the flight.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sugar Daddy
programme.desc: Dre is diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes and after talking to Pops, he's resolved to curing himself. Meanwhile, Jack is convinced that baby Devante hates him, so he enlists Junior and Diane's help.

programme.title: iHeartRadio Jingle Ball
programme.desc: Performers include Billie Eilish, Doja Cat, Dua Lipa, Harry Styles, Lewis Capaldi, Sam Smith, Shawn Mendes and more.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Charles Esten 4
programme.desc: Charles Esten is the guest comedian.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Red Dot
programme.desc: George buys Elaine a 'discounted' sweater in return for her help in finding him a job.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Shower Head
programme.desc: A business trip is jeopardized when a drug test indicates that Elaine is an opium addict.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sleep Tight, Puddin' Pop
programme.desc: Charlie puts himself in a compromising position when he spends a drunken evening with his stalker, Rose. Later, he comes face-to-face with her father, who demands to know what Charlie's intentions are with his daughter.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: One False Move, Zimbabwe
programme.desc: Walden's mother visits and Alan becomes smitten with her, even as she reveals a secret about Walden's past that sends him into a downward spiral.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Big Orange
programme.desc: Beverly and Lainey hate Barry's favourite shirt, so they hatch a plan together to destroy it. Once his shirt goes missing, Barry asks Adam and Erica to investigate. Meanwhile, Murray decides to tear down the family tree house.

programme.title: Mom: Figgy Pudding and the Rapture
programme.desc: Christy convinces herself that everything is fine even though her family is basically homeless. Surprisingly, Bonnie is the one who tries to bring her back to reality.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Putting a Hit on Christmas
programme.desc: Vanessa, worn out from the recent Thanksgiving holiday, longs for the quiet, no-fuss Christmases when it was just her and Mike.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: The Fight
programme.desc: Mike is surprisingly impressed with Ryan when they take Boyd to a baseball game and have a run-in with a tipsy Bill McKendree who's been on a downward spiral ever since Mike failed to give him the Outdoor Man account.

programme.title: Mom: Tush Push and Some Radishes
programme.desc: Following the death of Bonnie's mother, Christy and Bonnie learn that she kept a very big secret.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Roaches Everywhere/ Spilling My Business
programme.desc: Alleged roach infestation; a failing college bar divides a family.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Don't Bite the Hand That Feeds You/ Memorial Catering Catastrophe
programme.desc: Dispute between mother and daughter; woman sues caterer over unsatisfactory service.

programme.title: Protection Court: Hit Her With Car Door/ Eviction vs. Injunction
programme.desc: Judge Carroll Kelly advocates for the victims of crime by being tough, but fair.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Pervert Drone Down/ Generosity
programme.desc: Privacy concerns and a damaged drone; man claims Good Samaritan donates inferior goods.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Mcgowan vs. Martin
programme.desc: A Memphis, TN woman comes to court to prove that a man she met online is the father of her child. Meanwhile the man who has accepted her child as his own comes to court hoping the child may be his.

programme.title: The Yule Log
programme.desc: Get cozy and warm this Christmas in front of a fireplace and enjoy a variety of holiday carols.

programme.title: Gatlinburg Fantasy of Lights Christmas Parade
The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Dropping Everything.'

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Plaintiff sues over being sold a sick puppy; defendant says puppy had a clean bill of health prior to the sale. Then, a sister sues her brother over failure to pay for the car. He insists it was a gift, and his sister is trying to hustle him.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Stacy says her neighbour Jason failed to pay her the full amount for a cheque he was supposed to cash for her. Jason says he returned her money and gave her a free washer, dryer, and kitchen chairs.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: What Did Your New Girlfriend Do to Our Son?
programme.desc: Laquinta, Aliyah and Dre are in a threesome relationship. Now however, Aliyah is accusing Laquinta of physically abusing her son.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Ice Cold-Cocked
programme.desc: Jada is ready to face the reality that her relationship is headed in the wrong direction. But what she isn’t prepared for is the fact that her own cousin Keela is sleeping with her boyfriend David.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XII
programme.desc: Shane Buechele honours a childhood friend every game, Jhonattan Vegas takes a path from Venezuela to the PGA Tour, the author of Dear Andrew discusses his battle with leukemia and Matt Coleman's recruitment builds to on of the best games of his career.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XIII
programme.desc: Jordan and Jerry Windle share a bond and Mo Bamba was shaped by the courts of Harlem. Plus, look at Connor Williams's experience at the NFL draft.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XIV
programme.desc: Stories of love and motherhood for Longhorn athletes Brooke McCarty, Kaitlyn Washington, Sanya Richards-Ross and Tiffany Jackson.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XV
programme.desc: Features include Eddie Reese's path to excellence, Michael Dickson's transition from Australian rules football to American football, Texas twins Anna and Bianca Turati and a roundtable discussion with Doug Ghim, Scottie Sheffler and John Fields.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XVI
programme.desc: Take a special look at the 2018 Texas baseball team including Andy McGuire's return to Austin, Matteo Bocchi's path from Italy to Texas, the Jake of all trades and Augie Garrido's impact on baseball.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XVII
programme.desc: Sam Ehlinger, Andrew Jones and Alex Watson are three Texas athletes who exemplify the term 'Texas Tough.' We chronicle the obstacles they have had to overcome and how these experiences shaped their lives.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XVIII
programme.desc: For Pride Month, we highlight the stories of David Alviar, Jacob Cornish and Jordan Windle. Three athletes who have experienced personal journeys that have shaped their athletic careers.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XIX
programme.desc: Learn about lifetime Longhorns searching for inclusion in their sport. Plus, former Texas bigs discuss the art of the block in the NBA, and a relationship that crossed rival lines brought an NCAA title to Texas.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XX
programme.desc: The stories of how four fathers impacted their children's athletic careers at the University of Texas.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: The Nest
programme.desc: Friends battle an infestation at an Arctic facility.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: Fear Itself
programme.desc: For as long as he can remember, Bernard Selden has been haunted by a paralyzing fear. It started when he was six, when he set a fire that killed his four-year-old sister and today, at 27, the fear clings to him like a blanket.

programme.title: Sliders: Way Out West
programme.desc: Colin is wounded by a bullet from a black-hatted gunslinger.

programme.title: Quantum Leap: A Single Drop of Rain
programme.desc: Sam leaps into the life of a traveling rain-maker and must save his brother's marriage.

programme.title: Quantum Leap: Unchained (aka Melody)
programme.desc: Sam leaps into the persona of a prisoner on a chain gang in 1956.

programme.title: Quantum Leap: The Play's the Thing
programme.desc: Sam awakens as an actor in 1969 who is the boy toy of an older aspiring singer.

programme.title: Movie: Santa Claus Conquers the Martians
programme.desc: When the children of Mars become listless, Martians kidnap Santa and two children from Earth.

programme.title: Movie: Black Christmas
programme.desc: A serial killer makes terrorizing phone calls at a sorority house and murders the sorority sisters during Christmas break.

programme.title: Movie: Silent Night, Bloody Night
programme.desc: A man inherits an institution from his grandfather.
